parameters.query:
UPDATE bridge.agent_memos
SET body_json = body_json || '{"vote_triggered": true}'::jsonb
WHERE memo_id IN (
  SELECT memo_id FROM bridge.agent_memos
  WHERE memo_type IN ('approval_request', 'cro_review_request', 'cto_review_request')
    AND status = 'open'
    AND priority IN ('high', 'urgent')
    AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 days'
    AND (body_json->>'vote_triggered') IS NULL
  ORDER BY created_at ASC
  LIMIT 5
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
RETURNING memo_id, from_agent, subject, body_json, created_at,
          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - created_at))/86400 AS days_old;

WITH vote_request AS (
  INSERT INTO bridge.agent_memos
    (from_agent, to_agent, memo_type, priority, subject, body_json)
  VALUES
    ('chief_of_staff', 'cro',     'vote_request', 'urgent',
     $2, jsonb_build_object('original_memo_id', $1, 'vote_deadline_hours', 24)),
    ('chief_of_staff', 'finance',  'vote_request', 'urgent',
     $2, jsonb_build_object('original_memo_id', $1, 'vote_deadline_hours', 24)),
    ('chief_of_staff', 'cso',      'vote_request', 'urgent',
     $2, jsonb_build_object('original_memo_id', $1, 'vote_deadline_hours', 24)),
    ('chief_of_staff', 'cto',      'vote_request', 'urgent',
     $2, jsonb_build_object('original_memo_id', $1, 'vote_deadline_hours', 24)),
    ('chief_of_staff', 'chief_of_staff', 'vote_request', 'urgent',
     $2, jsonb_build_object('original_memo_id', $1, 'vote_deadline_hours', 24))
  RETURNING memo_id
),
log_event AS (
  INSERT INTO bridge.workflow_events (workflow_name, event_type, details_json)
  VALUES ('fallback_voting', 'vote_triggered',
    jsonb_build_object('original_memo_id', $1, 'subject', $2))
  RETURNING event_id
)
SELECT $1 AS original_memo_id, COUNT(*) AS vote_memos_created
FROM vote_request;

SELECT
  v.original_memo_id,
  o.subject,
  COUNT(v.memo_id) AS total_votes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (v.body_json->>'vote') = 'APPROVE' THEN 1 END) AS approve_votes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (v.body_json->>'vote') = 'REJECT' THEN 1 END) AS reject_votes,
  MAX(CASE WHEN v.from_agent = 'cso' AND (v.body_json->>'vote') = 'REJECT'
      THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS security_veto,
  (o.body_json->>'high_risk')::boolean AS is_high_risk
FROM bridge.agent_memos v
JOIN bridge.agent_memos o ON o.memo_id = (v.body_json->>'original_memo_id')::uuid
WHERE v.memo_type = 'vote_request'
  AND v.status = 'resolved'
  AND (o.body_json->>'vote_triggered') = 'true'
  AND o.status = 'open'
GROUP BY v.original_memo_id, o.subject, o.body_json
HAVING COUNT(v.memo_id) >= 4
   AND COUNT(CASE WHEN v.status = 'resolved' THEN 1 END) >= 4;

WITH decision AS (
  SELECT
    $1::uuid AS memo_id,
    CASE
      WHEN $6::boolean = true THEN 'REJECTED'  -- high-risk never auto-approved
      WHEN $4::int = 1 THEN 'REJECTED'          -- security veto
      WHEN $2::int >= 4 THEN 'APPROVED'
      ELSE 'REJECTED'
    END AS outcome,
    $2::int AS approve_votes,
    $3::int AS reject_votes,
    $4::int AS security_veto
),
update_memo AS (
  UPDATE bridge.agent_memos
  SET status = CASE WHEN (SELECT outcome FROM decision) = 'APPROVED'
                   THEN 'resolved' ELSE 'resolved' END,
      resolved_at = NOW(),
      resolved_by = 'fallback_voting',
      resolution_notes = (SELECT outcome FROM decision) || ' by fallback vote (' ||
        (SELECT approve_votes::text FROM decision) || '/5 approve, security_veto=' ||
        (SELECT security_veto::text FROM decision) || ')'
  WHERE memo_id = $1::uuid
  RETURNING memo_id
),
notify_cos AS (
  INSERT INTO bridge.agent_memos
    (from_agent, to_agent, memo_type, priority, subject, body_json)
  VALUES (
    'fallback_voting', 'chief_of_staff', 'vote_result', 'high',
    'Fallback vote result: ' || (SELECT outcome FROM decision),
    jsonb_build_object(
      'original_memo_id', $1,
      'outcome', (SELECT outcome FROM decision),
      'approve_votes', $2, 'reject_votes', $3,
      'security_veto', $4, 'is_high_risk', $6
    )
  ) RETURNING memo_id
),
log_event AS (
  INSERT INTO bridge.workflow_events (workflow_name, event_type, details_json)
  VALUES ('fallback_voting', 'vote_decided',
    jsonb_build_object('memo_id', $1, 'outcome', (SELECT outcome FROM decision),
      'votes', $2 || '/5'))
  RETURNING event_id
)
SELECT (SELECT outcome FROM decision) AS final_outcome,
       (SELECT memo_id FROM notify_cos) AS cos_notified;
